{{Quote|Gyla Petro... File: Human, to 10th degree. Born: Sidereal era AS-5667 on Kalgo Thirteen.|Mistress Mnemos|<ref name="The Kashyyyk Depths">"[[The Kashyyyk Depths]]"</ref>}}
'''Kalgo 13''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kalgo system/Legends|Kalgo system]]. It was the homeworld of [[Gyla Petro]].

{{Planet-stub}}
